title: COUNSELING - 211info
text: JEWISH FAMILY AND CHILD SERVICE COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health care to individuals and families. Services include psychotherapy for adults across the lifespan, specialized geriatric psychotherapy, counseling for children, teens, and families, short-term, solution-focused therapy, and group-based processing and support. 1221 SW Yamhill Street Suite 301 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2pm Email (503) 226-7079 650 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 226-7079 Main phone (503) 226-7079 Ext: 650 Intake Intake (503) 226-7079 ext 650 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Call for appointment. FEES: Providers accept OHP, Medicare, Optum, Providence, Moda, BCBS, and other insurance out of network. Sliding-scale options are available for those who are uninsured or underinsured. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, completed Intake Packet AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: -MAX red and blue lines. Closest stops: Galleria and SW 10th, Providence Park, Library and SW 9th -Portland Streetcar: 11th and Taylor, 11th and Alder -TriMet bus lines 15 and 63 Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Geriatric Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MUTUAL SUPPORT - HOLOCAUST SURVIVOR SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JEWISH FAMILY AND CHILD SERVICE
